2606.10528.title: Representation-Aware Advantage Estimation: Your Reward Model Provides More Than A Scalar Output
2606.10528.paper_summary: Current reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) methods primarily rely on scalar rewards from a trained reward model (RM). While effective, scalar rewards are often noisy and fail to capture fine-grained preference differences, whereas RM hidden states encode richer semantic and preference information. We introduce the representation-aware advantage estimation, which leverages RM hidden states and models them as auxiliary signals for better advantage estimation. Specifically, we propose the Graph-based Advantage Estimation (GraphAE), treat each sampled group as a graph, where nodes correspond to responses and edges capture their similarity in the RM hidden space. Then advantages are computed via graph propagation, enabling each sample to incorporate contextual information from its neighbors. GraphAE is lightweight and can be seamlessly integrated into existing group-based RL algorithms. We apply GraphAE to GRPO, GSPO and RLOO, and conduct extensive experiments on different models and benchmarks. Empirical results show consistent improvements across three benchmarks, with gains of up to + 6.3 on Arena-Hard-v0.1, + 8.27 on AlpacaEval 2.0, and + 0.22 on MT-Bench. These results demonstrate that leveraging RM representations leads to more sample efficient and robust RLHF.
2606.10528.paper_summary_zh: 目前的基於人類反饋的強化學習 (RLHF) 方法主要依賴於來自訓練獎勵模型 (RM) 的標量獎勵。雖然有效，但標量獎勵通常噪聲較大，無法捕捉細微的偏好差異，而 RM 的隱藏狀態則編碼了更豐富的語義和偏好信息。我們引入了基於表示的優勢估計，利用 RM 的隱藏狀態，並將其建模為輔助信號以改善優勢估計。具體而言，我們提出了基於圖的優勢估計 (GraphAE)，將每個抽樣組視為一個圖，其中節點對應於響應，邊緣捕捉它們在 RM 隱藏空間中的相似性。然後，通過圖的傳播計算優勢，使每個樣本能夠從其鄰居中整合上下文信息。GraphAE 輕量且可以無縫集成到現有的基於組的 RL 算法中。我們將 GraphAE 應用於 GRPO、GSPO 和 RLOO，並在不同模型和基準上進行了廣泛的實驗。實證結果顯示在三個基準上均有一致的改進，在 Arena-Hard-v0.1 上增益高達 +6.3，在 AlpacaEval 2.0 上增益為 +8.27，在 MT-Bench 上增益為 +0.22。這些結果表明，利用 RM 表示可以實現更高的樣本效率和更穩健的 RLHF。
2606.10528.author: Guozheng Li et.al.
2606.10528.authors: Guozheng Li, Xiyan Fu, Yiwen Guo
